summary: Phase 1 UX instrumentation: task_clicked, task_approved, task_dismissed events via juli:analytics with workflow, task_type, persona_id, session_id payloads. Wired through TaskCard, useTaskExecutor, TaskQueue, and all three workflow panels. Fail-silent emit. Engagement threshold documented in PRD.

interfaceChanges.description: Phase 1 UX analytics sink in lib/ux-analytics; dispatches juli:analytics CustomEvents.
Requires personaId; emits task_clicked on card engagement (excludes approve/dismiss buttons).
Requires personaId option; emits task_approved and task_dismissed on actions.
Replaced by structured task_* UX events (issue #122).

mappings.criterion: Payload includes workflow, task_type, persona_id, session_id; no PII
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ux_instrumentation.test.tsx::emits task_clicked with workflow, task_type, persona_id, session_id

mappings.criterion: Instrumentation wired into shared task card and all three workflow pages
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ux_instrumentation.test.tsx::wires instrumentation into all three workflow panels

mappings.criterion: Analytics failures do not break approve/dismiss or navigation
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ux_instrumentation.test.tsx::analytics failures do not break approve or dismiss

mappings.criterion: Unit tests assert events fire on click, approve, dismiss
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ux_instrumentation.test.tsx::emits task_clicked with workflow, task_type, persona_id, session_id
web/src/__tests__/test_ux_instrumentation.test.tsx::documents engagement threshold for Phase 1 exit gate
